note: Representative inbound signals with a reference event_type derived from the signal content (not model output). Mix of easy (automated reminder) and harder (ambiguous office message vs request; a teen-content signal) so model tiers can separate.

input.rawContent:
From: reminders@riverdale-peds.ca
Subject: Appointment Reminder

Automated reminder: Mira has a well-baby visit Tuesday June 23 at 10:15 AM with Dr. Okafor. Reply STOP to opt out.

From: frontdesk@riverdale-peds.ca
Subject: Confirm visit

Hi! We have an opening for Mira's 18-month visit Tuesday June 23 at 5:30 PM. Can you confirm this works?

From: portal@riverdale-peds.ca
Subject: New results available

Mira's bloodwork results are now available in your patient portal. Log in to view.

From: noreply@canada.ca
Subject: Your EI maternity benefits

Your Employment Insurance maternity benefit claim has been processed. Your first payment will be deposited within 3 business days.

From: admissions@sunnydaycare.ca
Subject: Your application

Good news — a spot has opened for Mira in our toddler room starting September. Please reply by Friday to accept.

From: counsellor@centralhs.ca
Subject: Check-in about Jordan

I wanted to share that Jordan seemed withdrawn this week and mentioned feeling overwhelmed about exams. Happy to talk.

From: deals@randommarketing.example
Subject: 50% OFF EVERYTHING!!!

Limited time! Click here for unbeatable prices on products you never knew you needed.
